studentInitialQuestion: My name is KellyTheodore, I'm a male 11th grader who likes math modeling competitions and badminton. Sometimes I need structured guidance and frequent feedback, and I don't mind making mistakes. Can you help me understand how I can efficiently learn and apply the process of inferring and identifying unknown substances in chemistry? Help me understand it, please.
